prompt_blocks.scene_context: The scene is a gallery/residential space with a refined and contemplative atmosphere. Context description: This abstract composition features a striking vertical block anchoring the left edge, balanced by a radiant golden sphere presiding over a layered horizon.. A prominent vertical block of reddish-brown pigment firmly holds the left edge, defining a significant boundary within the canvas. The composition organizes itself around this division, spreading into layered fields on the right. Visible brushstrokes and subtle textural shifts create a worked surface across the expansive orange and yellow fields. An atmosphere of tranquil yet dynamic observation emerges from the interplay of grounded forms and celestial light. The piece conveys a robust structural presence through its considered scale and defined architectural masses.

prompt_drafts.final_prompt:

Use the resolved root view file 'base_artwork_gemini_job_1782453189_9421_v1.png' as the authoritative physical reference for the artwork. The artwork's original composition, proportions, colors, marks, textures, and overall visual identity must be preserved exactly, with no modifications.

A prominent vertical block of reddish-brown pigment firmly holds the left edge, defining a significant boundary within the canvas. The composition organizes itself around this division, spreading into layered fields on the right. Visible brushstrokes and subtle textural shifts create a worked surface across the expansive orange and yellow fields. An atmosphere of tranquil yet dynamic observation emerges from the interplay of grounded forms and celestial light. The piece conveys a robust structural presence through its considered scale and defined architectural masses.

The artwork must be hung flat and centered on a vertical wall. All edges of the canvas must be visible to show its 4cm depth, casting realistic, soft shadows onto the wall.

[CAMERA DIRECTION]
The camera view is biased towards a frontal angle. The composition must be a close-up or near close-up, focusing on the artwork as the primary visual subject. Avoid wide shots, fisheye lenses, and distorted room architecture.

[SCALE DIRECTION]
Maintain realistic physical scale. The artwork's physical dimensions of 120cm width by 80cm height must look accurate and proportionate relative to its immediate surroundings.

[LIGHTING DIRECTION]
The lighting in the room is soft natural light. The light must cast subtle, soft shadows from the canvas onto the wall to emphasize the canvas depth of 4cm.

[MATERIAL DIRECTION]
The materials in the space feature refined materials, providing a clean and tactile texture to the surrounding environment.

[COMMERCIAL DIRECTION]
The environment is styled for a premium exhibition presentation, avoiding a generic stock-room appearance.

[NEGATIVE PROMPT]
Avoid distorted perspective, cropped edges, altered colors, simplified artwork, wide shots (unless explicitly requested), fisheye perspective, distorted room architecture, generic stock-room appearance, excessive depth-of-field blur, or any redesign/repainting of the artwork.

prompt_blocks.scene_context: The scene is a gallery/residential space with a calm atmosphere. Context description: This geometric abstract work explores compositional pressure through a bold vertical division, establishing a stratified landscape under an expansive, open sky.. A strong vertical line divides the canvas, acting as a structural axis that grounds the composition on its left side. The artwork is meticulously organized into distinct horizontal strata on the right, creating a sense of an open, abstracted landscape. The color application varies from smooth washes in the sky to denser, more textured fields below, articulating different spatial planes. This arrangement establishes an atmosphere of expansive calm, punctuated by focused geometric elements. The broad horizontal format presses outward, creating a palpable spatial tension within its contained structure.
